tests.name: subscribe flow > homepage subscribe widget submits and shows success state
subscribe flow > submit button is disabled until consent checkbox is checked
subscribe flow > subscribe widget appears at the bottom of an archive detail page
legal pages > privacy page renders policy heading and key sections
legal pages > terms page renders terms heading and key sections
confirm page status states > success status shows confirmed message
confirm page status states > expired status shows expired message
confirm page status states > invalid status shows invalid message
unsubscribe page > success status shows unsubscribed confirmation

subscribe tokens > confirm token success path: pending -> confirmed
tests.notes: Real DB + browser navigation through GET /api/confirm. REQ-005.

tests.name: subscribe tokens > confirm token invalid -> /confirm?status=invalid
subscribe tokens > confirm token expired -> /confirm?status=expired
tests.notes: REQ-007 / EDGE-003. Token issued with past expiry via reused HMAC logic.

tests.name: subscribe tokens > unsubscribe token success: confirmed -> unsubscribed
subscribe tokens > already-confirmed re-confirm is idempotent success
subscribe tokens > unsubscribe token wrong-type / tampered HMAC redirects to success but does NOT change status
subscribe full flow > submits via the homepage widget, persists pending row, confirms via token
tests.notes: REQ-003 + REQ-005. End-to-end browser submit, real Resend send, DB-token confirm.

tests.name: admin analytics seeded > metric cards render expected counts for the seeded window
tests.notes: REQ-029. Inserts 5 subscribers + 10 email_sends + 6 ses_events; asserts API + UI render correct counts.

tests.name: admin analytics seeded > granularity selector switches without breaking render
admin analytics seeded > from > to date range returns 400
admin analytics seeded > date range BEFORE seeded data yields zero counts
SNS webhook signed payload > permanent bounce marks subscriber bounced
tests.notes: REQ-019. Self-signed RSA key + cert via node-forge; verifySnsMessage uses injected certFetcher.

tests.name: SNS webhook signed payload > transient bounce records event but does not mark bounced
SNS webhook signed payload > complaint marks subscriber complained
SNS webhook signed payload > delivery, open, click events stored
SNS webhook signed payload > duplicate bounce dedups via unique constraint
SNS webhook signed payload > invalid signature returns 400, no event persisted
SNS webhook signed payload > SubscriptionConfirmation triggers SubscribeURL fetch
Newsletter send (real Resend) > delivers to all 3 confirmed subscribers; email_sends rows persisted
tests.notes: Real Resend API call. Sends to delivered@/bounced@/complained@resend.dev. Asserts 3 rows in email_sends with non-empty Resend message_ids.

tests.name: Newsletter send (real Resend) > does not duplicate sends on re-run for same archive (idempotency)

ses_setup.event_destination: sns-all-events (BOUNCE, COMPLAINT, DELIVERY, OPEN, CLICK, REJECT)
